RetryPromptBuilderState.description: State model derived from RetryPromptBuilder TLA+ spec

TypeOK.description: Verifier for invariant TypeOK from RetryPromptBuilder spec

RequiredSectionsPresent.description: Verifier for invariant RequiredSectionsPresent from RetryPromptBuilder spec

InitialPromptAlwaysPresent.description: Verifier for invariant InitialPromptAlwaysPresent from RetryPromptBuilder spec

PreviousOutputAlwaysPresent.description: Verifier for invariant PreviousOutputAlwaysPresent from RetryPromptBuilder spec

ClassificationIncludedWhenExpected.description: Verifier for invariant ClassificationIncludedWhenExpected from RetryPromptBuilder spec

ClassificationOmittedWhenNoInstruction.description: Verifier for invariant ClassificationOmittedWhenNoInstruction from RetryPromptBuilder spec

CounterexampleIncludedWhenPresent.description: Verifier for invariant CounterexampleIncludedWhenPresent from RetryPromptBuilder spec

CounterexampleOmittedWhenAbsent.description: Verifier for invariant CounterexampleOmittedWhenAbsent from RetryPromptBuilder spec

GWTThenCondition.description: Verifier for invariant GWTThenCondition from RetryPromptBuilder spec

OnlyKnownSections.description: Verifier for invariant OnlyKnownSections from RetryPromptBuilder spec

assert_TypeOK.condition:
and error_class in ErrorClasses
    and has_counterexample in {TRUE, FALSE}
    and prompt_sections \subseteq PromptSectionUniverse
    and phase in Phases
assert_TypeOK.description: Test assertion for TypeOK from RetryPromptBuilder spec

assert_RequiredSectionsPresent.message:
Assertion failed: RequiredSectionsPresent — phase = "complete" =>
        RequiredCoreSections \subseteq prompt_sections
assert_RequiredSectionsPresent.description: Test assertion for RequiredSectionsPresent from RetryPromptBuilder spec

assert_InitialPromptAlwaysPresent.description: Test assertion for InitialPromptAlwaysPresent from RetryPromptBuilder spec

assert_PreviousOutputAlwaysPresent.description: Test assertion for PreviousOutputAlwaysPresent from RetryPromptBuilder spec

assert_ClassificationIncludedWhenExpecte.condition:
(phase = "complete" and error_class in InstructionClasses) implies
        "classification" in prompt_sections
assert_ClassificationIncludedWhenExpecte.message:
Assertion failed: ClassificationIncludedWhenExpected — (phase = "complete" /\ error_class \in InstructionClasses) =>
        "classification" \in prompt_sections
assert_ClassificationIncludedWhenExpecte.description: Test assertion for ClassificationIncludedWhenExpected from RetryPromptBuilder spec

assert_ClassificationOmittedWhenNoInstru.condition:
(phase = "complete" and error_class not in InstructionClasses) implies
        "classification" not in prompt_sections
assert_ClassificationOmittedWhenNoInstru.message:
Assertion failed: ClassificationOmittedWhenNoInstruction — (phase = "complete" /\ error_class \notin InstructionClasses) =>
        "classification" \notin prompt_sections
assert_ClassificationOmittedWhenNoInstru.description: Test assertion for ClassificationOmittedWhenNoInstruction from RetryPromptBuilder spec

assert_CounterexampleIncludedWhenPresent.condition:
(phase = "complete" and has_counterexample = TRUE) implies
        "counterexample" in prompt_sections
assert_CounterexampleIncludedWhenPresent.message:
Assertion failed: CounterexampleIncludedWhenPresent — (phase = "complete" /\ has_counterexample = TRUE) =>
        "counterexample" \in prompt_sections
assert_CounterexampleIncludedWhenPresent.description: Test assertion for CounterexampleIncludedWhenPresent from RetryPromptBuilder spec

assert_CounterexampleOmittedWhenAbsent.condition:
(phase = "complete" and has_counterexample = FALSE) implies
        "counterexample" not in prompt_sections
assert_CounterexampleOmittedWhenAbsent.message:
Assertion failed: CounterexampleOmittedWhenAbsent — (phase = "complete" /\ has_counterexample = FALSE) =>
        "counterexample" \notin prompt_sections
assert_CounterexampleOmittedWhenAbsent.description: Test assertion for CounterexampleOmittedWhenAbsent from RetryPromptBuilder spec

assert_GWTThenCondition.condition:
(phase = "complete" and error_class in InstructionClasses) implies
        and "classification" in prompt_sections
        and "previous_output" in prompt_sections
        and "initial_prompt" in prompt_sections
assert_GWTThenCondition.message:
Assertion failed: GWTThenCondition — (phase = "complete" /\ error_class \in InstructionClasses) =>
        /\ "classification" \in prompt_sections
       ...
assert_GWTThenCondition.description: Test assertion for GWTThenCondition from RetryPromptBuilder spec

assert_OnlyKnownSections.description: Test assertion for OnlyKnownSections from RetryPromptBuilder spec
